content.about:
Customer wants more local leads from Rochester and surrounding suburbs. Currently gets most business from word of mouth. Wants a clean, modern website that looks trustworthy and ranks well on Google.

Interested in highlighting emergency services, panel upgrades, EV charger installs, and commercial work. Wants customers to be able to request quotes easily.

Mentioned competitor sites look outdated and wants something that feels premium but still approachable.

Prefers dark blue and orange branding. No existing logo but open to ideas. Has photos of past jobs.

Big priority: mobile experience and fast load times.
